name: yaml-to-html-skill
description: Marketplace hosting the yaml-to-html explainer plugin.

plugins.name: yaml-to-html
plugins.description: Two skills: generate-explainer-yaml captures meaning (core.yaml) + strategy (view.yaml) from a document/repo/PR/spec; generate-explainer-html builds an offline light/dark bundle with switchable, additive iframe views and copyable add-a-view prompts.
